channel.title: Forward Pass
channel.description: Your daily digest of the top papers in tabular AI.

item.title: Forward Pass — Issue 6 (Jul 15, 2026)
item.description: 2 papers — GRAFT reframes table retrieval in data lakes as graph matching, gaining ~8-11% over prior retrievers on Spider/BIRD.

item.title: Forward Pass — Issue 5 (Jul 14, 2026)
item.description: 4 papers — Graph foundation models are borrowing tabular ICL backbones: GTAlign aligns graph structure to a TabPFNv2.5/LimiX-16M input format for in-context node/graph classification.
